name: @opencode-ai/intelgraph
description: Plugin-based code intelligence graph: extracts, queries, and visualizes structural facts about C/C++ and TypeScript codebases. Speaks MCP and ships a CLI.

scripts.build: /usr2/adagur/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.js --target node --format esm --external better-sqlite3 && /usr2/adagur/.bun/bin/bun build ./src/bridge/index.ts --outfile ./dist/bridge.js --target node --format esm
scripts.validate:01880: env WLAN_WORKSPACE_ROOT=/local/mnt/workspace/code1/WLAN.CNG.1.0-01880.3-QCACNGSWPL_V1_V2_SILICON-1 CLANGD_TCP_BRIDGE_PORT=35101 CHAIN_TEST_TIMEOUT_01880_MS=60000 CHAIN_RETRY_TIMEOUT_01880=1 CHAIN_RESOLVE_TIMEOUT_MS=20000 npx vitest run test/integration/chain-resolver-ground-truth.test.ts
scripts.validate:matrix:conditional-go: npm run validate:unit && npm run typecheck && npm run validate:01880
scripts.validate:graph: npm run build && npm run typecheck && env WLAN_WORKSPACE_ROOT=/local/mnt/workspace/code1/WLAN.CNG.1.0-01880.3-QCACNGSWPL_V1_V2_SILICON-1/wlan_proc npm run test:unit && echo '✓ graph validation: build + unit checks passed'
